name: Flooring
title: AI Tools for Flooring Companies | Turnkey AI
meta_description: Custom AI tools for flooring companies — quote jobs fast, follow up on estimates, and keep installs scheduled. Built in two weeks, starting at $1,500.
hero_lede: Flooring customers are comparison shoppers — they want a quote, samples, and a timeline. We build the tools that quote fast, follow up well, and keep your install schedule full.
drains: Quote requests that need fast pricing across many material options
Estimates that go quiet while the customer compares bids
Measuring and material math eating the owner's time
Install scheduling that shifts with material lead times

tools.title: Quote-request assistant
tools.body: Every inquiry gets an instant reply, the job scoped — room count, square footage, material type — and a measure appointment booked, so the pipeline stays full.

tools.title: Estimate follow-up assistant
tools.body: Every open estimate gets a well-timed follow-up while the customer compares options, so you don't lose jobs to the contractor who simply circled back.

tools.title: Estimate drafter
tools.body: From your measure notes, it drafts a clean estimate — material, underlayment, labor, removal — across the options the customer is weighing.

tools.title: Morning install brief
tools.body: One text each morning: today's installs, crew assignments, material deliveries due, and yesterday's numbers.

cases.context: A flooring company whose customers shopped multiple bids.
cases.before: Estimates went out and the company lost track during the customer's comparison phase.
cases.after: Every open estimate followed up automatically while the customer decided.
cases.impact: Representative result: a meaningful lift in close rate against comparison shoppers.

cases.context: A flooring company with slow quote turnaround.
cases.before: Quotes took days because of measuring and material math.
cases.after: Drafts ready for a quick review right after the measure.
cases.impact: Representative result: faster quotes and more jobs won on responsiveness.

faq.q: Can it quote across material types?
faq.a: Yes. It drafts estimates across the options a customer is comparing — hardwood, LVP, tile, carpet — from your pricing.

faq.q: How does it help against comparison shoppers?
faq.a: Flooring customers shop bids. The follow-up tool keeps your quote in front of them with a well-timed, friendly nudge, so you win on attentiveness, not just price.

faq.q: Will it work with my software?
faq.a: Yes. We build on top of whatever you use to track leads, measures, and installs.
